componentDescription: Renders a multi-line text input field with various styles and states according to the design guidelines.

defaultValue.description: The initial value of the textarea before any user interaction.

error.description: Indicates if the textarea is in an error state.

isEditable.description: Determines if the content of the textarea can be edited by the user.

helperText.description: Supplementary text displayed below the textarea to provide additional guidance.

id.description: A unique identifier for the textarea element.

isReadOnly.description: Specifies if the textarea's content is read-only.

isDisabled.description: Disables the textarea, preventing user interaction.

isAutoFocus.description: Automatically focuses the textarea when the component mounts.

isMultiline.description: Specifies if the input field should allow multiple lines of text.

label.description: The label text displayed for the textarea.

maxRows.description: The maximum number of rows the textarea can display.

maxCols.description: The maximum number of columns the textarea can display.

name.description: The name attribute of the textarea element.

placeholder.description: The placeholder text displayed when the textarea is empty.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the value of the textarea changes.

onChangeText.description: Callback function triggered when the text content of the textarea changes.

onBlur.description: Callback function triggered when the textarea loses focus.

onFocus.description: Callback function triggered when the textarea gains focus.

size.description: Defines the size of the textarea.

shadow.description: Applies a shadow effect to the textarea.

shape.description: Defines the border shape of the textarea.

views.description: Custom styling options for different parts of the textarea component.

value.description: The current value of the textarea.

variant.description: Defines the visual style variant of the textarea.

hint.description: A hint text used as a fallback for the placeholder.

setHint.description: Function to update the hint text.

isHovered.description: Indicates if the textarea is currently being hovered over by the mouse.

setIsHovered.description: Function to update the hover state of the textarea.

setValue.description: Function to update the value of the textarea.

isFocused.description: Indicates if the textarea is currently in focus.

setIsFocused.description: Function to update the focus state of the textarea.
